## Summary
- adds CostOps revenue and document-generation helper layer
- adds revenue and document-generation ledger tables
- extends the evaluation cost ledger API with revenue, document generation, gross profit, gross margin, average cost/revenue, highest/lowest cost, and job-level profitability
- updates the mobile evaluation Cost Ledger UI with compact title, sticky summary strip, 24H/5D/30D/ALL range buttons, and revenue/profit cards

Closes #1003.
